sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58682" key="koloku/ntinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοκύντ-ινος</orth>, v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολοκύνθινος</foreign>. -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58682.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κολόκυνθος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.532</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
